race.comment: ARIAT (5) went close this grade/trip at Eagle Farm and then stepped up to a mile there and found the 85 a bit rich. She will use the low barrier and is well placed at this level with a handy 2kg claim. SAVAII (7) has been switched from NSW by the Archibald yard, and was last seen 19 days ago beaten 2L over 1400m at Goulburn in a 66. That stacks up, and he will be fitter again. VICTORY COMMAND (3) peaks and has been racing in stronger metro contests. Has switched yards on an 18-day return and the blinkers go on again, and the rest of the extra gear comes off. Back to a sprint and can go a lot better at this level. LONE FORCE (12) has the rail and is up to this at best. Tumbles in weight and will be fitter second-up.
